from datasets import load_from_disk, Dataset, DatasetDict
from collections import defaultdict
import re
import numpy as np

np.random.seed(42)

ds = load_from_disk('/lixiang/project/huxing/Project_test/AgentSDKMetricSkill/data/deepscaler')

# ---- classify ----
def classify(problem_text):
    text = problem_text.lower()
    scores = defaultdict(int)

    geometry = [
        r'\btriangle\b', r'\bcircle\b', r'\bangle\b', r'\bquadrilateral\b',
        r'\bpolygon\b', r'\bhexagon\b', r'\bpentagon\b', r'\boctagon\b',
        r'\bsphere\b', r'\bcube\b', r'\bcylinder\b', r'\bcone\b',
        r'\bradius\b', r'\bdiameter\b', r'\bcircumference\b', r'\bperimeter\b',
        r'\barea\b', r'\bvolume\b', r'\bsurface\b',
        r'\bparallel\b', r'\bperpendicular\b', r'\bcongruent\b',
        r'\btangent\b', r'\bchord\b', r'\binscribed\b', r'\bcircumscribed\b',
        r'\bvertices\b', r'\bvertex\b', r'\bdiagonal\b', r'\bmidpoint\b',
        r'\barc\b', r'\bsector\b',
        r'(?:right|isosceles|equilateral|scalene)\s+triangle',
        r'(?:square|rectangle|parallelogram|rhombus|trapezoid|kite)',
        r'\bcoordinates?\b', r'\bcoordinate\s+plane\b',
        r'\bpyramid\b', r'\bprism\b', r'\bsolid\b',
        r'\basy\b', r'\[asy\]', r'\basymptote\b',
        r'in\s+the\s+(?:adjoining|accompanying|given|following)\s+figure',
        r'\b(?:side\s+length|edge\s+length)\b',
        r'\bthree-dimensional\b', r'\b3-?d\b',
        r'\breflect(?:ed|ion)\b', r'\brotat(?:e|ed|ion)\b',
        r'\bgeometric\b', r'\bpolyhedron\b', r'\btetrahedron\b',
        r'\bsimilar\b.*\b(?:triangle|figure|shape)\b',
        r'\bconcentric\b', r'\bcircumcenter\b', r'\bincenter\b', r'\bcentroid\b',
        r'\baltitude\b', r'\bmedian\b', r'\bbisector\b',
        r'\blaw\s+of\s+(?:sines|cosines)\b',
        r'\bstright\s+line\b', r'\bline\s+segment\b',
        r'\bslope\b', r'\bhemisphere\b', r'\bcircular\b', r'\bsemicircle\b',
        r'\bquadrant\b', r'\bsymmetry\b',
    ]
    for pat in geometry:
        if re.search(pat, text): scores['geometry'] += 1

    nt_pat = [
        r'\bdivisible\b', r'\bdivisibility\b', r'\bdivisor\b', r'\bfactor(?:s|ization)?\b',
        r'\bprime\b', r'\bcomposite\b',
        r'\bgcd\b', r'\bgreatest\s+common\s+(?:divisor|factor)\b',
        r'\blcm\b', r'\bleast\s+common\s+multiple\b',
        r'\bmod\b', r'\bmodulo\b', r'\bmodular\b', r'\bcongruence\b',
        r'\bremainder\b', r'\bquotient\b',
        r'\b(?:positive\s+)?integer\b',
        r'\beven\b', r'\bodd\b',
        r'\bdigits?\b', r'\bthree-digit\b', r'\btwo-digit\b', r'\bfour-digit\b',
        r'\bbase\s*\d+\b', r'\bdecimal\s+representation\b',
        r'\bconsecutive\s+integer', r'\bpalindrome\b',
        r'\brelatively\s+prime\b', r'\bcoprime\b',
        r'\bunits?\s+digit\b', r'\btens?\s+digit\b', r'\bhundreds?\s+digit\b',
        r'\bsum\s+of\s+(?:the\s+)?digits\b',
        r'\bperfect\s+square\b', r'\bperfect\s+cube\b',
        r'\bfloor\b', r'\bceiling\b',
        r'\bnumber\s+of\s+(?:positive\s+)?divisors\b',
        r'\bprime\s+factorization\b', r'\bnumeral\b',
        r'\bnon-zero\s+digits?\b', r'\bnonzero\s+digits?\b',
    ]
    for pat in nt_pat:
        if re.search(pat, text): scores['number_theory'] += 1

    combo_pat = [
        r'\bprobability\b', r'\bprobabilities\b',
        r'\bcombination\b', r'\bcombinatorial\b', r'\bpermutation\b',
        r'\bhow\s+many\b', r'\bnumber\s+of\s+ways?\b',
        r'\bcount(?:ing)?\b', r'\barrangement\b',
        r'\bchoose\b', r'\bchosen\b', r'\bselect(?:ed|ing)?\b',
        r'\bbinomial\s+coefficient\b', r'\bpascal\b',
        r'\bpigeonhole\b', r'\bcommittee\b',
        r'\boutcome\b', r'\bsample\s+space\b',
        r'\bexpected\s+value\b', r'\bexpectation\b',
        r'\bdie\b', r'\bdice\b', r'\bcoin\b', r'\bflip\b',
        r'\bbag\b.*\b(?:marble|ball|red|blue|green)\b',
        r'\bdeck\b.*\bcard\b', r'\brandom(?:ly)?\b',
        r'\bcasework\b', r'\bdistinct\b.*\bways?\b',
        r'\bcoupon\b', r'\bstars?\s+and\s+bars?\b',
        r'\bfactorial\b', r'\binclusion.exclusion\b',
        r'\bdistinguishable\b', r'\bindistinguishable\b',
        r'\brecurrence\b', r'\bseats?\b.*\boccupied\b', r'\bseated\b',
    ]
    for pat in combo_pat:
        if re.search(pat, text): scores['combinatorics'] += 1

    trig_pat = [
        r'sin\b', r'cos\b', r'tan\b', r'cot\b', r'sec\b', r'csc\b',
        r'\bsine\b', r'\bcosine\b', r'\btangent\b',
        r'\btrigonometry\b', r'\btrigonometric\b', r'\bradians?\b',
    ]
    for pat in trig_pat:
        if re.search(pat, text): scores['trigonometry'] += 1

    stats_pat = [
        r'\bmean\b', r'\bmedian\b', r'\bmode\b',
        r'\bstandard\s+deviation\b', r'\bvariance\b',
        r'\baverage\b', r'\bpercent(?:age)?\b',
        r'\bdata\s+set\b', r'\bdistribution\b',
        r'\bhistogram\b', r'\bpercentile\b', r'\bfrequency\b',
    ]
    for pat in stats_pat:
        if re.search(pat, text): scores['statistics'] += 1

    applied_pat = [
        r'\b(?:dollar|cent|price|cost|money|sell|buy|sale|discount|profit|loss)\b',
        r'\b(?:mile|km|kilometer|meter|inch|foot|feet|yard|cm|mm)\b',
        r'\b(?:hour|minute|second|day|week|month|year)\b',
        r'\b(?:speed|velocity|rate|time|distance)\b',
        r'\b(?:weight|mass|pound|ounce|kg|gram)\b',
        r'\b(?:mixture|concentration)\b',
        r'\b(?:work\s+rate|work\s+together)\b',
        r'\b(?:age\s+problem|years\s+old|years\s+younger|years\s+older)\b',
        r'\b(?:upstream|downstream|current)\b',
        r'\b(?:train|car|plane|boat|bus)\b.*\b(?:travel|move)\b',
        r'\b(?:nickel|dime|quarter|penny|coin)\b',
    ]
    for pat in applied_pat:
        if re.search(pat, text): scores['applied'] += 1

    if any(scores.values()):
        return max(scores, key=scores.get)
    return 'arithmetic'

# ---- Filter algebra problems ----
print("Filtering algebra problems...")
algebra_indices = []
for i in range(len(ds)):
    if classify(ds[i]['problem']) == 'algebra':
        algebra_indices.append(i)

print(f"Total algebra problems found: {len(algebra_indices)}")

# Shuffle and select 532 (512 train + 20 eval)
np.random.shuffle(algebra_indices)
selected = algebra_indices[:532]
train_indices = selected[:512]
eval_indices = selected[512:532]

# Create datasets
train_ds = ds.select(train_indices)
eval_ds = ds.select(eval_indices)

# Save
out_dir = '/lixiang/project/huxing/Project_test/AgentSDKMetricSkill/data/deepscaler_algebra'
train_ds.save_to_disk(f'{out_dir}/train')
eval_ds.save_to_disk(f'{out_dir}/eval')
print(f"\nSaved:")
print(f"  Train: {len(train_ds)} problems → {out_dir}/train")
print(f"  Eval:  {len(eval_ds)} problems → {out_dir}/eval")

# Preview eval problems
print("\n=== EVAL SET (20 problems) ===")
for i in range(len(eval_ds)):
    p = eval_ds[i]['problem'][:150].replace('\n', ' ')
    a = eval_ds[i]['answer']
    print(f"  [{i+1:2d}] {p}...  →  answer: {a}")

    combinatorics = [
        r'\bprobability\b', r'\bcombination\b', r'\bcombinatorial\b',
        r'\bpermutation\b', r'\bhow\s+many\b', r'\bnumber\s+of\s+ways?\b',
        r'\bcount(?:ing)?\b', r'\barrangement\b', r'\bchoose\b', r'\bchosen\b',
        r'\bselect(?:ed|ing)?\b', r'\bpigeonhole\b', r'\bcommittee\b',
        r'\boutcome\b', r'\bsample\s+space\b', r'\bexpected\s+value\b',
        r'\bexpectation\b', r'\bdie\b', r'\bdice\b', r'\bcoin\b', r'\bflip\b',
        r'\brandom(?:ly)?\b', r'\bcasework\b', r'\bdistinct\b.*\bways?\b',
        r'\bcoupon\b', r'\bfactorial\b', r'\bdistinguishable\b',
        r'\bindistinguishable\b', r'\brecurrence\b', r'\bseats?\b.*\boccupied\b',
    ]
    for pat in combinatorics:
        if re.search(pat, text): scores['combinatorics'] += 1

    trigonometry = [
        r'sin\b', r'cos\b', r'tan\b', r'cot\b', r'sec\b', r'csc\b',
        r'\bsine\b', r'\bcosine\b', r'\btangent\b',
        r'\btrigonometry\b', r'\btrigonometric\b', r'\bradians?\b',
    ]
    for pat in trigonometry:
        if re.search(pat, text): scores['trigonometry'] += 1

    stats_pat = [
        r'\bmean\b', r'\bmedian\b', r'\bmode\b',
        r'\bstandard\s+deviation\b', r'\bvariance\b',
        r'\baverage\b', r'\bpercent(?:age)?\b',
        r'\bdata\s+set\b', r'\bdistribution\b',
        r'\bhistogram\b', r'\bpercentile\b', r'\bfrequency\b',
    ]
    for pat in stats_pat:
        if re.search(pat, text): scores['statistics'] += 1

    applied = [
        r'\b(?:dollar|cent|price|cost|money|sell|buy|sale|discount|profit|loss)\b',
        r'\b(?:mile|km|kilometer|meter|inch|foot|feet|yard|cm|mm)\b',
        r'\b(?:hour|minute|second|day|week|month|year)\b',
        r'\b(?:speed|velocity|rate|time|distance)\b',
        r'\b(?:weight|mass|pound|ounce|kg|gram)\b',
        r'\b(?:mixture|concentration)\b',
        r'\b(?:work\s+rate|work\s+together)\b',
        r'\b(?:years\s+old|years\s+younger|years\s+older)\b',
        r'\b(?:upstream|downstream|current)\b',
        r'\b(?:nickel|dime|quarter|penny|coin)\b',
    ]
    for pat in applied:
        if re.search(pat, text): scores['applied'] += 1

    # Algebra: catch what doesn't belong to the above special categories
    algebra = [
        r'\bequation\b', r'\bsolve\b', r'\bpolynomial\b', r'\bquadratic\b',
        r'\bcubic\b', r'\bfunction\b', r'\binequality\b', r'\bexpression\b',
        r'\bsimplify\b', r'\bsequence\b', r'\bseries\b',
        r'\barithmetic\s+progress', r'\bgeometric\s+progress',
        r'\bsummation\b', r'\blog(?:arithm)?\b', r'\bexponent(?:ial)?\b',
        r'\babsolute\s+value\b', r'\bdefined\s+by\b', r'\bfor\s+all\b',
        r'\bpositive\s+real\b', r'\breal\s+numbers?\b',
        r'\bvariable\b', r'\bcoefficient\b', r'\broots?\b',
        r'\bsystem\s+of\s+equations\b', r'\bbinomial\b',
        r'\binverse\s+function\b', r'\brational\s+function\b',
        r'\blogarithmic\b',
        r'\bvalue\s+of\b', r'\bdetermine\b',
        r'\\frac\b', r'\\sqrt\b', r'\\sum\b', r'\\prod\b',
        r'\bminimum\s+value\b', r'\bmaximum\s+value\b',
    ]
    for pat in algebra:
        if re.search(pat, text): scores['algebra'] += 1

    # Deduplicate: remove "algebra" signal from problems that clearly belong to another category
    # If a problem has strong geometry/NT/combo signals, it's not algebra
    if scores['geometry'] >= 2 and scores['algebra'] < 3:
        scores['algebra'] = 0
    if scores['number_theory'] >= 2 and scores['algebra'] < 3:
        scores['algebra'] = 0
    if scores['combinatorics'] >= 2 and scores['algebra'] < 3:
        scores['algebra'] = 0
    if scores['trigonometry'] >= 2 and scores['geometry'] >= 2:
        scores['algebra'] = 0

    if any(scores.values()):
        return max(scores, key=scores.get)
    return 'algebra'  # most unclassified math problems are algebra

# ---- Filter ----
print("Filtering algebra problems...")
algebra_indices = []
for i in range(len(ds)):
    if classify(ds[i]['problem']) == 'algebra':
        algebra_indices.append(i)

print(f"Total algebra problems: {len(algebra_indices)}")

np.random.shuffle(algebra_indices)
selected = algebra_indices[:532]
train_idx = selected[:512]
eval_idx = selected[512:532]

train_ds = ds.select(train_idx)
eval_ds = ds.select(eval_idx)

out_dir = '/lixiang/project/huxing/Project_test/AgentSDKMetricSkill/data/deepscaler_algebra'
train_ds.save_to_disk(f'{out_dir}/train')
eval_ds.save_to_disk(f'{out_dir}/eval')

print(f"\nSaved:")
print(f"  Train: {len(train_ds)} problems → {out_dir}/train")
print(f"  Eval:  {len(eval_ds)} problems → {out_dir}/eval")

print("\n=== EVAL SET (20道代数评测题) ===")
for i in range(len(eval_ds)):
    p = eval_ds[i]['problem'][:200].replace('\n', ' ')
    a = eval_ds[i]['answer']
    print(f"[{i+1:2d}] {p}")
    print(f"     答案: {a}")
    print()
